creator: jt@obs-sec.com
text:
(In reply to Tobias C. Berner from comment #8)

Sorry, I've been swamped with work recently.  I've been busy forking the upstream project to use in Lumina, so that's been taking all my focus.  As soon as I get that wrapped up I'll work on getting you a new patch.  I still wonder if the best course of action isn't for me to continue to try to push this upstream.
